title: SLSS BOM 2024 25 Strategic Initiatives
body:
JULY 2024

OUR STRATEGIC INITIATIVES SEASON 2024/25 – OPERATIONAL   OUR STRATEGIC INTIATIVES  1. WHY – OUR MISSION & STRATEGIC INITIATIVES

THE SURF LIFE SAVING MISSION • SAVE LIVES • CREATE GREAT AUSTRALIANS • BUILD BETTER COMMUNITIES

HOW WE CONTRIBUTE TO THE MISSION

WE SUPPORT WE DEVELOP

WE ENGAGE WE INNOVATE  2. HOW WE CONTRIBUTE TO THE MISSION

SUPPORT DEVELOP Supporting our clubs, members, Providing the training, resources and neighbouring organisations and opportunities to our members that communities to achieve our common continue the development of their goal: ‘zero deaths’. skills and knowledge, for use both on and off the beach.

ENGAGE INNOVATE Engaging our membership, ensuring Continuing to lead in innovation, that they know about the pathways constantly improving, learning from and opportunities offered by the our experiences and planning for the organisation. future. - COMMON MINDSET

LIFESAVING & SUPPORT OPERATIONS

SUPPORT DEVELOP ENGAGE INNOVATE

SUPPORT DEVELOP ENGAGE

DEVELOP ENGAGE INNOVATE

SUPPORT DEVELOP ENGAGE MEMBER SERVICES

SUPPORT DEVELOP ENGAGE INNOVATE

SUPPORT

LIFESAVING & SUPPORT OPERATIONS • Develop & Support Patrolling Members • Provide Trainer & Assessor Support to the Illawarra Branch • Interbranch Youth Camp at Illawarra Branch • Garie SLSC Youth Camp MEMBER SERVICES • Member Leadership Skills Development Day (18-25’s) • Upskill Club MPIOs • Member Focussed Engagement Report • Diversity & Inclusion Collaboration & Support Resources

DEVELOP

LIFESAVING & SUPPORT OPERATIONS MEMBER SERVICES • Growth & Development of Support Operations • Member Leadership Skills Development Day • Develop & Support our Patrolling Members (18-25’s) • Member Focussed Engagement Report • Diversity & Inclusion Collaboration & Support • Increased Training Officers and Assessors Resources • Increased Participation in Silver Medallion Patrol • Mental Health First Aid Courses Captain courses • Youth Development Pathway Camp (Interbranch) • Adaptive Athlete Development Clinics • Youth Dragon Boat Racing Team

ENGAGE

LIFESAVING & SUPPORT OPERATIONS MEMBER SERVICES • Growth & Development of Support Operations • Members Services Club Officers Support • Ideate & Innovate for the Next Generation Resource • Mental Health First Aid Courses • Diversity & Inclusion Collaboration & Support • Increased Training Officers and Assessors Resources • Increased Participation in Silver Medallion Patrol Captain courses • Sydney Branch Pool Rescue Championships • Sydney Branch Surfboard Riding Series and Championships • Interbranch Youth Camp at Illawarra Branch • Garie SLSC Youth Camp • End of Season Youth Function

INNOVATE

LIFESAVING & SUPPORT OPERATIONS • Ideate & Innovate for the Next Generation • Sydney Branch Surfboard Riding Series and Championships MEMBER SERVICES • Members Services Club Officers Support Resource - LIFESAVING & SUPPORT OPERATIONS

1. GROWTH & DEVELOPMENT OF SUPPORT OPERATIONS • Engage more members to participate in Support Operations roles while continuing to improve our operational capabilities and existing Support Operations members.

2. DEVELOP & SUPPORT OUR PATROLLING MEMBERS • Supporting our clubs and members by undertaking regular ‘health checks’, while increasing engagement, implementing support mechanisms for clubs.

3. IDEATE & INNOVATE FOR THE NEXT GENERATION • Engaging the next generation of SLS Leaders, providing Development Camps and Workshops encouraging the development of leadership skills, and out-of-the-box thinking. - EDUCATION

1. INCREASED TRAINING OFFICERS & ASSESSORS • Developing and engaging more members to take on the roles of Trainers and Assessors to enable Clubs to upskill and develop their members.

2. INCREASED PARTICIPATION IN SILVER MEDALLION PATROL CAPTAIN COURSES • Developing the skills of our Patrol Captains and Future SLS Leaders, while providing a means of engagement.

3. PROVIDING TRAINER & ASSESSOR SUPPORT TO THE ILLAWARRA BRANCH • Supporting our neighbours by sharing our knowledge, skills and resources. – SURF SPORTS

1. YOUTH DEVELOPMENT PATHWAY CAMP (INTERBRANCH) • Youth Development Clinics to further enhance the skills of Youth Members and provide them support in the Elite Athlete pathways.

2. ADAPTIVE DEVELOPMENT CLINICS • Providing a pathway for the further development of the Adaptive Athletes.

3. SYDNEY BRANCH POOL RESCUE CHAMPIONSHIPS • Organise a Pool Rescue Championship event to encourage further engagement in this event at a local level.

4. SYDNEY BRANCH SURFBOARD RIDING SERIES AND CHAMPIONSHIPS • Delivering an innovative Surfboard riding series to promote Board Riding within the Branch. – YOUTH & JUNIOR

1. INTERBRANCH YOUTH CAMP AT ILLAWARRA BRANCH • Engaging our Youth whilst simultaneously supporting our neighbouring Illawarra Branch.

2. GARIE SLSC YOUTH SUPPORT CAMP • Engaging our Youth whilst simultaneously supporting Garie SLSC

3. END OF SEASON YOUTH FUNCTION • Providing an opportunity for Youth members to interact, socialise and share ideas.

4. YOUTH DRAGON BOAT RACING TEAM • Develop the skills, fitness, leadership and team building abilities of our Youth members. – MEMBER SERVICES

1. MEMBERS SERVICES CLUB OFFICERS SUPPORT RESOURCE • Create an overarching support resource for club Members Services officers. 2. MEMBER LEADERSHIP SKILLS DEVELOPMENT DAY (18-25S) • Undertake a Member Leadership Skills Development Day focussing on enhancing growth for our 18-25yo members 3. UPSKILL CLUB MPIOS • Upskill our club MPIOs by running 2 Training courses 4. MENTAL HEALTH FIRST AID COURSES • Run Mental Health First Aid Courses for our clubs 5. MEMBER FOCUSSED ENGAGEMENT REPORT • Produce a report for clubs to discuss member focussed engagement, following on from a club Development Day 6. DIVERSITY & INCLUSION COLLABORATION & SUPPORT RESOURCES • Diversity and Inclusion collaboration and support resources for our clubs  3. WHAT – THE ACTIVITIES

MEASURE

• How can the activities assist in measuring the progress or standing of the initiative?

IMPACT

• What are the Benefits to Clubs, Members and the Community?

TIMELINES & ACHIEVABILITY

• Is the initiative achievable in the desired timeframe?

FUNDING & RESOURCES

• As discussed in Budget Meetings.

PARTNERSHIPS/SPONSOR ALIGNMENT

• Would there be a key sponsor or partner that can assist in this area?
